result.summary: Mapped Indeed’s public developer surface as a GraphQL API family authenticated via partner OAuth app credentials, plus an MCP server documented by Indeed with connection/auth details not recoverable from the available pages.

indeed_oauth_app.label: Indeed partner OAuth client (client ID and secret)
indeed_oauth_app.setup: Sign a Developer Agreement with Indeed and ask Indeed to register your app as part of the integration setup. After Indeed registers the app, open [Partner Console](https://console.indeed.com/) to access your OAuth credentials (`client_id` and `client_secret`). The Retrieve Candidates integration guide explicitly says Indeed registers your app and then you can access credentials in Partner Console; the authentication docs list 2-legged and 3-legged OAuth flows under [Authentication](https://docs.indeed.com/authentication/).

grounding: https://hk.indeed.com/職涯貼士/履歷及求職信
